raw.message: You don't want to miss this game!

hook.summary: A strategy guide hook demonstrating a counter to a popular game tactic.
hook.visual_action: Gameplay footage of a Goblin Barrel being countered by a Log spell.

scene_flow: Gameplay starts with 'How To Defend LogBait!' text overlay.
Player counters a Goblin Barrel with The Log and deploys a Knight.
The gameplay escalates into a chaotic scene with an absurd number of units on screen.
Final CTA screen with the Clash Royale logo and 'PLAY NOW' button.
audience_proxy: Mid-core mobile gamers interested in tower defense and competitive strategy games.
